# AWK(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  awk — pattern-directed scanning and processing language

## SYNOPSIS
  awk [-F delimiter] 'program' [file]

## DESCRIPTION
Processes text files line by line, splitting fields and applying patterns.

## OPTIONS
  -F sep  field separator (default: whitespace)

## EXAMPLES
  awk -F: '{print $1}' /etc/passwd
  awk '{print $1}' /var/log/nexus.log
  cat /etc/passwd | awk -F: '{print $1, $3}'

## SEE ALSO
  sed, cut, grep
